notes: Chunk 62 DONE (Template B, Tier B, 25 routes): Baltic (EE/LV/LT) and Slovenia (SI) outbound to Nordic countries (SE/NO/DK/FI) x14 + Baltic/SI to Central Europe (AT/CH/CZ) x11. All intra-EU or EU-to-aligned-country routes. Norway tapeworm rule flagged for dogs. Switzerland EU-passport acceptance explained. Road travel options noted for SI-AT and SI-CH. Next: Chunk 63 (Template C, Tier B). Blog Day 25 after.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
